title: plagiobothrys trachycarpus
intro: Plagiobothrys trachycarpus, also known as seaside blomma or sea blomma, is a plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Plagiobothrys trachycarpus is often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from respiratory ailments.
